name: Cheesy Chicken Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Skinless Boneless Chicken Breast Halves (about 12 oz total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl combine cheese, mushrooms, the 1/4 cup yogurt, chives, parsley, and pimento.
2. Place one chicken breast half, boned side up, between two pieces of clear plastic wrap.
3. Working from the center to the edges, pound lightly with a meat mallet until it is 1/8 inch thickness.
4. Remove the plastic wrap. Repeat with remaining chicken.
5. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
6. Spread some of the filling on each chicken breast half.
7. Fold in the sides and roll up.
8. Arrange rolls seam side down in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish.
9. Combine bread crumbs and paprika.
10. Brush chicken with the 1 tablespoon yogurt; sprinkle with crumb mixture.
11. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20-25 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
